text:
I forgot the second part of it, the inclusion in calendars.all:

diff -u -r1.9 calendar.all
--- calendars/calendar.all	16 Aug 2004 09:31:09 -0000	1.9
+++ calendars/calendar.all	3 Jun 2007 12:05:57 -0000
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@
 
 #include <calendar.world>
 #include <calendar.croatian>
+#include <calendar.dutch>
 #include <calendar.french>
 #include <calendar.german>
 #include <calendar.hungarian>
